attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  ST.TRANSACTION_TYPE             
  ,ST.INVOICE_NUMBER               
  ,ST.INVOICE_CURRENCY             
  ,ST.INVOICE_DATE                 
  ,ST.GL_DATE                      
  ,ST.STAGE_ACCOUNTING_DATE        
  ,ST.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER          
  ,ST.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM
  ,COALESCE (ST.INVOICE_QUANTITY, 0)            
  ,COALESCE (ST.INVOICE_DIST_AMOUNT_TRX_CUR, 0) 
  ,COALESCE (ST.ADV_PMT_AMOUNT, 0)               
  ,ST.PO_HEADER_ID                 
  ,ST.CFN_PO_NUMBER                
  ,ST.ARIBA_PO_NUMBER              
  ,ST.PO_LINE_NUMBER               
  ,ST.SEGMENT1                     
  ,ST.SEGMENT2                     
  ,ST.SEGMENT3                     
  ,ST.SEGMENT4                     
  ,ST.SEGMENT5                     
  ,ST.SEGMENT6                     
  ,ST.ORG_ID                       
  ,ST.LEDGER_ID                    
  ,ST.STATUS                       
  ,ST.INACTIVE_DATE                
  ,ST.INTERCOMPANY_YN              
  ,ST.IC_COMPANY                   
  ,ST.IC_LOCATION                  
  ,ST.IC_DEPARTMENT                
  ,ST.IC_GL_ACCOUNT                
  ,ST.IC_PROJECT                   
  ,ST.IC_SUBACCOUNT                
  ,ST.REQUEST_ID                   
  ,ST.REQUEST_DATE                 
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE1                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE2                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE3                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE4                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE5                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE6                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE7                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE8                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE9                   
  ,ST.ATTRIBUTE10                  
  ,ST.CREATION_DATE                
  ,ST.CREATED_BY                   
  ,ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE             
  ,ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY              
  ,ST.SUPPLIER_NAME                
  ,ST.INVOICE_LINE_TYPE            
  ,ST.ACCRUAL_CATEGORY             
  ,ST.INVOICE_LINE_DESC            
  ,ST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY          
  ,COALESCE (ST.INVOICE_DIST_AMOUNT_FUNC_CUR, 0)
  ,ST.JOURNAL_STATUS               
  ,ST.INVOICE_ID                   
  ,ST.ERROR_CODE                   
  ,ST.ERROR_MESSAGE                
  ,ST.TAX_RATE                     
  ,ST.TAX_CODE                     
  ,ST.REQUESTOR                    
  ,ST.ORACLE_TAX_CODE              
  ,COALESCE (ST.UNIT_PRICE , 0)                 
  ,ST.GG_REFERENCE_ID             
  ,ST.GLOBAL_NAME                  
  ,ST.GES_UPDATE_DATE              
FROM $$STGDB.ST_ARIBA_URAP_INVOICE ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ARIBA_URAP_INVOICE EL
                    WHERE ST.GG_REFERENCE_ID = EL.GG_REFERENCE_ID)
